instruction: Output ONLY a valid JSON object. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Do NOT include any text outside the JSON. The ONLY valid top-level key is 'findings'. Its value MUST be a JSON array ([...]), never a dict, never an object keyed by principle name such as {"OCP": [...], "LSP": [...]}. Return {"findings": []} if you find no violations.

common_mistakes.reason: findings must be an array, not a dict keyed by principle name
findings must be a flat array, not a nested wrapper object
no keys other than 'findings' are allowed at the top level
the root value must be an object, not an array
severity must be one of: error, warning, info
principle must be exactly OCP or LSP

findings.message: Short, concrete description of the issue.
findings.details: Detailed explanation of why it violates the principle and how it could be refactored.
findings.suggestion: Extract each branch into a separate strategy class implementing a common interface.
